scripts.coverage: E2E_COVERAGE=1 playwright test && cd .. && c8 report --temp-directory=e2e/coverage/v8 --reporter=text --reporter=html --reporter=json-summary --report-dir=e2e/coverage --include='server/**/*.ts' --exclude='server/**/*.test.ts' --exclude='server/tests/**' --exclude='server/bin/**' --exclude='server/openapi.json' --exclude='server/db/sqlite3/migrations/**'
